action.content:
Infer the date from context.

Q: Today is Christmas Eve of 1937. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 12/14/2026
(B) 12/14/1950
(C) 12/14/2007
(D) 12/14/1937
(E) 07/14/1938
(F) 12/14/1988
A: (D)

Q: Tomorrow is 11/12/2019. What is the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 09/04/2018
(B) 11/11/2018
(C) 08/25/2018
(D) 11/02/2018
(E) 11/04/2018
A: (B)

Q: Jane and John married on Jan 2, 1958. It is their 5-year anniversary today. What is the date tomorrow in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 01/11/1961
(B) 01/03/1963
(C) 01/18/1961
(D) 10/14/1960
(E) 01/03/1982
(F) 12/03/1960
A: (B)

Q: Today is the last day of the first quarter of 2008. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?
Options:
(A) 04/01/2008
(B) 01/17/2008
(C) 03/31/2008
(D) 04/01/2007
(E) 04/01/2063
(F) 03/22/2008
A:
action.label: context

action.content:
The first quarter of a year consists of January, February, and March. Therefore, the last day of the first quarter of 2008 is **March 31, 2008** (03/31/2008).

The question asks for the date 24 hours later (tomorrow).
- Current date: 03/31/2008
- Tomorrow's date: 04/01/2008

Comparing this with the given options:
(A) 04/01/2008 - Matches.
(B) 01/17/2008 - Incorrect.
(C) 03/31/2008 - This is today, not tomorrow.
(D) 04/01/2007 - Incorrect year.
(E) 04/01/2063 - Incorrect year.
(F) 03/22/2008 - Incorrect date.

The correct option is **(A)**.
action.label: response
